summary: Redirect syncResource NDJSON events to stderr during workflow archive --json so stdout is a single parseable JSON document.
reason: Generated syncResource writes per-event NDJSON to os.Stdout; workflow archive --json then appended a final summary object on the same stream, producing dual-format output that neither json.Unmarshal nor a strict NDJSON parser accepts. Patched locally so users piping `--json` into jq get clean JSON; NDJSON progress events still surface on stderr.
validated_outcome: After fix, `workflow archive --json > out.txt` produces a 4-key JSON object parseable by python json.load; 47 NDJSON event lines land on stderr.
upstream_issue: Generator-level fix needed: syncResource should route events through a writer that switches to stderr when --json is set. Filed as retro candidate for cli-printing-press.
